commit_scope: Add the practical Transmission Recipe Atlas guide with runnable recipe-card walks.

commands: curl -sS --max-time 10 https://api.coherencycoin.com/api/concepts/lc-transmission-recipe-atlas | jq '{id, status: .status, story_chars: (.story_content | length), has_guide_link: (.story_content | contains("transmission-recipe-atlas-guide")), has_group_practice: (.story_content | contains("first group practice"))}'
git fetch origin main && git rebase origin/main
local_validation.summary: The Transmission Recipe Atlas now has a practical guide with an eight-step source walk, three complete worked payloads, a pairing prompt table, quality check, and first group practice. The concept status moved to deepening and links to the guide. Public concept sync/readback confirms the guide link and group-practice text are present. Existing unrelated wellness drift remains in older spec source/symbol maps. Local substrate ingest-paths for the changed KB files hung and was killed, so it is not counted as passing proof.

phase_gate.reason: Docs-only local and public KB validation passed; CI and post-merge deploy validation remain pending until PR flow completes.
